parameters.prompt: One isolated photorealistic longitudinal spacecraft drive pod, 13 m long, 3.2 m wide and 3.0 m high. Armored forward mount, serviceable reactor and power casing, thermal-break structure, radiator channels, RCS cluster, gimbal housing and one large aft plasma nozzle. Clear structural mounting rail along the inboard side, layered aerospace construction and realistic bevels, forward faces +Z. One connected object only. No ship hull, second pod, wings, weapon, landing gear, loose pipes, text, logo, stand, ground, or background.
parameters.texture_prompt: De-lit photorealistic spacecraft drive hardware: dark carbon-composite casing, brushed titanium mounts, charcoal ceramic thermal panels, heat-stained nozzle alloy, restrained amber service latches, localized thermal and maintenance wear. No baked lighting, pseudo-text, logos, glowing seams, broad grime, or battle damage.

strengths: single connected 3.73:1 longitudinal drive module closely matches the authored proportion
mount, casing, thermal channels, gimbal housing and aft nozzle remain readable
required_cleanup: remove radial antenna-like fins that violate the bounded pod envelope
separate nozzle/gimbal rigid parts and author the inboard mount socket
mirror only through the authored ship assembly rather than duplicating source identity
